categories.note: usage = number of posts referencing the category id. 170/196 posts are only 'Uncategorized' (id 1). Most categories are city/program taxonomies, not editorial sections.
definedButUnused: 3 of the 18 defined categories have zero post usage (orphan/parent taxonomy terms).

tags.note: Tags are very sparsely used: 180 of 196 posts have NO tags at all; only 16 posts are tagged. 54 distinct tag ids appear, each on 1-4 posts. Tags add little organizational value and could be dropped or merged into categories during the rebuild.

authors.note: author = post.author id, resolved against users.json. 'Ren' (9) and 'Juma Ventures' (3) are the two real editorial accounts and cover 193 of 196 posts. All should likely collapse to a single 'Juma' byline on the new site.

resolution.primary: post.featured_media (int id) -> look up id in media-manifest.json -> use .sizes.full (or .url). Each manifest entry also has alt, width, height, and named size variants (medium/thumbnail/causes/full).
resolution.fallback1: If featured_media is 0 or not in the manifest, use yoast_head_json.og_image[0].url (covers id 1094 and 18 featured-less posts). This is a remote juma.org URL.
resolution.localFiles: media-local-map.json maps the remote juma.org URL -> a downloaded local path (e.g. 'extraction/media/7251-JUMALogoSlogan-scaled.png'). 519 assets already downloaded. For the MDX rebuild, prefer resolving featured_media -> manifest url -> media-local-map.json local path so hero images are bundled locally.
resolution.noHero: 52 posts have neither a featured_media nor an og_image; these are mostly 'Thank You to Our Funders' donor-list posts, job postings, and board-announcement posts. The rebuild should supply a category/default placeholder hero or render them without a hero.

contentShapeNotes.summary:
Post bodies are NOT Elementor-built. Zero posts contain elementor / elementor-widget / data-elementor markup (Elementor is used on Pages, not Posts). Post content is plain WordPress HTML: classic-editor

prose for the bulk of older posts, and Gutenberg block HTML (wp-block-image, wp-block-spacer, has-medium-font-size, figure/aligncenter) on ~21-22 recent posts. Average rendered length ~3,185 chars (min 182, max 35,588).
htmlArtifactsToClean: HTML entities throughout: ’ (curly apostrophe), “/” (curly quotes), — (em dash), &,  , …. Decode to unicode when converting to MDX.

Gutenberg wrapper classes on ~22 posts:
,

tags carry WordPress-specific noise: width/height/srcset/sizes/decoding/fetchpriority/loading attrs, class="wp-image-XXXX" (11 posts), and inline style="width:840px;height:auto" (47 posts with inline style). Drop srcset/sizes/class/style; keep src + alt; rewrite src through media-local-map.json.

Image src hosts: ~53 inline images point at juma.org/wp-content/uploads (rewrite to local), but ~16 images are hot-linked from Google (ci3/ci4/ci5.googleusercontent.com, lh5.googleusercontent.com) on the donor 'Thank You' posts (ids 4892, 4791, 4605, 4479, 4476, 4446, 4437, 4420, 4415, 4411, 4406, 4373, 2847). Those Google URLs WILL rot and must be re-downloaded or removed.

Video embeds: 8 posts contain <iframe> (5 Vimeo player.vimeo.com, 3 youtube.com). Convert to a responsive embed component. Note Bootstrap leftover wrappers <div class="container/row/col-md-12"> and <div class="video-container"> around some embeds (e.g. id 4366).
Leftover shortcode/placeholder text: id 2040 has a literal '[VIDEO]' placeholder in prose. id 3716 contains Outlook/MSO conditional-comment junk ('[if lt IE 9]', 'mso-' styles) that must be stripped.
The bracketed-text scan produced mostly false-positive 'shortcodes' (e.g. '[For youth]', '[Juma]') that are ordinary prose in square brackets and should be left as-is.

Donor 'Thank You to Our Funders' posts are long
-separated name lists inside a single

; convert to a clean list or keep as a single block.
updatedDate: 59 of 196 posts have post.modified on a different calendar day than post.date; map post.modified -> updatedDate (omit when equal to publishDate).
contentShapeNotes.conversionEffort:
Low-to-moderate and largely mechanical. Recommended pipeline: (1) decode HTML entities; (2) strip Gutenberg/Bootstrap/MSO wrapper divs and WP-specific img attributes; (3) convert HTML -> Markdown (e.g. rehype/turndown), preserving

, , /, lists, blockquotes; (4) rewrite juma.org image src -> local asset paths via media-local-map.json and re-host or drop googleusercontent images; (5) turn iframes into an Astro embed component; (6) lift hero image out of body when it duplicates featured_media.

fieldNotes.title: From post.title.rendered, HTML-entity-decoded.
fieldNotes.slug: From post.slug. Two slugs are URL-encoded and need cleanup: id 5157 'atlanta-assistant-enterprise-manager-part-time%ef%bf%bc' (stray U+FFFF) and the generic 'juma-' (id 225).
fieldNotes.updatedDate: post.modified, only emitted when its calendar day differs from publishDate (59 posts).
fieldNotes.author: Collapse 4 WP accounts; 'Juma Ventures' -> 'Juma'. Most posts are org-authored.
fieldNotes.categories: Map category ids -> names. Recommend dropping the catch-all 'Uncategorized' and keeping only the city/program terms.
fieldNotes.tags: Optional; consider dropping entirely given 92% of posts are untagged.
fieldNotes.heroImage: Use Astro image() so hero is a local optimized asset. Resolution order: featured_media -> media-manifest -> media-local-map local path; fallback yoast og_image.
fieldNotes.excerpt:
post.excerpt.rendered, stripped of

and decoded. 1 post has an empty excerpt -> make optional/auto-generate.
fieldNotes.draft: All 196 source posts are publish; default false.

nonArticlePosts.note: These are typed 'post' in WordPress but are structural/operational/landing content rather than editorial blog articles. Recommend routing them OUT of the blog collection (job board, RFP archive, donor acknowledgements, or simple pages) during the rebuild.

rfpProcurement.title: Juma Ventures External Evaluator RFP Bidders Conference 10/31/2022 - Slides and Video
Juma Ventures Request For Proposal (RFP) for CalVIP grant

videoEmbedOnlyLanding.title: Paving the Way ... with Juma CEO Adriane Armstrong
videoEmbedOnlyLanding.reason: Body is only a Bootstrap-wrapped Vimeo iframe; no prose, no excerpt, no featured image.

thinAnnouncementCandidates.title: Our San Francisco Office has Moved!
2014 Annual Report is Now Available Online
thinAnnouncementCandidates.reason: Short pointer to a downloadable report on /financials/.

donorAcknowledgementSeries.note: 33 near-identical 'Thank You to Our (Recent) Funders' posts (recurring quarterly donor lists). Editorial value is low; consider a single rolling 'Funders' page or excluding from the article feed. Most have no hero image.

boardAnnouncementSeries.note: Recurring 'Juma welcomes ... to National Board of Directors' announcements; borderline news, keep if a 'News' section exists, otherwise demote.
